assertions.assertion: Uses CookieContainer and HttpClientHandler with AllowAutoRedirect = false for cookie-based session simulation
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the specific CookieContainer + AllowAutoRedirect=false pattern for BFF testing

assertions.assertion: Test asserts /bff/user returns HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401) without a prior login
Test asserts the local API route returns HttpStatusCode.BadRequest (400) when the x-csrf header is missing
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know BFF returns 400 (not 401) for missing x-csrf header

assertions.assertion: Includes the x-csrf: 1 header on the antiforgery-passing test case
assertions.rationale: General BFF knowledge might include the x-csrf header requirement
